cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with what at the end of these swaps. The problem involves tracking the gifts through a series of swaps between Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Let me start by listing out the initial gifts each person has: - Alice: Yellow present - Bob: Orange ball - Claire: Red present - Dave: Purple present - Eve: Green present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap step by step and keep track of each person's gift after each exchange. First swap: Alice and Eve swap their gifts. So Alice was holding yellow, and Eve had green. After swapping: - Alice: Green present - Eve: Yellow present The others remain the same for now: - Bob: Orange ball - Claire: Red present - Dave: Purple present Second swap: Bob and Dave swap their gifts. Bob had orange, Dave had purple. After swapping: - Bob: Purple present - Dave: Orange ball Current holdings: - Alice: Green - Bob: Purple - Claire: Red - Dave: Orange - Eve: Yellow Third swap: Bob and Eve swap their gifts. Bob has purple, Eve has yellow. After swapping: - Bob: Yellow present - Eve: Purple present Now: - Alice: Green - Bob: Yellow - Claire: Red - Dave: Orange - Eve: Purple Fourth swap: Claire and Eve swap their gifts. Claire has red, Eve has purple. After swapping: - Claire: Purple present - Eve: Red present Current status: - Alice: Green - Bob: Yellow - Claire: Purple - Dave: Orange - Eve: Red Fifth swap: Dave and Alice swap their
